title: Post-compaction continuity — schema deltas
description: The schema changes this spec introduces: a first-class `enrichment` recentEvent kind (DD-1), the amnesia-injection decision input (DD-2), and the per-provider compaction-gate decision (DD-4). The CompactionManager intake contract is unchanged and not re-specified here.

SessionRecentEventKind.note: DD-1: `enrichment` becomes first-class; enrichment events stop being forced into `compaction`.

AmnesiaDecisionInput.rule: DD-2: reverse-scan; `kind !== 'compaction'` is skipped (now correctly excludes enrichment); first successful client-side compaction (kind ∈ CLIENT_SIDE_COMPACTION_KINDS) ⇒ inject:true.

ProviderCompactionGate.signature: shouldCompact(provider: ProviderClass, observed: Observed, windowHeadroom: number): boolean
ProviderCompactionGate.rule: DD-4: claude + sufficient windowHeadroom on cache-aware/legacy-large-policy ⇒ false (decline); codex/general ⇒ unchanged. Provider-aware, NOT a global threshold change.

notes: Behaviour-preserving for real compaction recentEvents and for codex/general compaction.
SDK types (packages/sdk/js) must be regenerated for the new kind.
